Infinite scroll with onLoadMore + loading state.
Same widget admin uses for Bills (parent finance)
and Pengumuman list. No per-screen pagination.
(slate). Same colors and shape as parent's
• Filter: opens AppFilterBottomSheet · Terapkan triggers refetch with the filters
• Active filter chips: tap × to remove a single filter, or "Hapus semua" link
• Tap card → Detail page · Long-press → enter bulk-select mode (haptic feedback)
• FAB → AppEditBottomSheet (Tambah Siswa) — same pattern admin already uses
• Empty state: existing copy from AdminCrudScaffold (Tap + untuk menambah siswa)
